{{Infobox character
| name = Grandmaster Naraka's hand
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Grandmaster Naraka]]'s left hand is frail and encircled by scar tissue.}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
